prestazioni: Engine swap to a Jaguar AJ-V8 Gen III 5.0L supercharged (engine code: AJ133S) with a Harrop HTV2300 supercharger upgrade, forged internals (Mahle pistons, Eagle H-beam rods), and a custom ECU tune by Dynochip UK for 550+ HP at 12 PSI boost

Full drivetrain reinforcement: Quaife ATB differential (front and rear), Land Rover G4 transmission with a Puma transfer case upgrade, and a custom 3.54:1 gear ratio setup by JE Motorsport for optimized off-road and on-road performance

Suspension overhaul with Bilstein B16 coilovers (8-way adjustable damping), Eibach Pro-Kit springs, and a custom 3-link rear setup with polybushings from Polybush UK, paired with Terrafirma heavy-duty anti-roll bars
estetica: Custom Heritage Edition-inspired widebody kit by JE Motorsport, featuring flared fenders, aluminum rock sliders, and a vented hood with a functional heat extractor

Bare aluminum exterior panels (doors, hood, tailgate) with a brushed finish, paired with a custom front bumper by Mantec 4x4 featuring integrated Warn Zeon 12-S winch and Rigid Industries D-Series Pro LED light bar

Interior retrim with full Alcantara upholstery (seats, door cards, headliner) by Royal Steering Wheels UK, featuring a custom MOMO Heritage steering wheel, Sparco Pro 2000 seats, and a bespoke center console with integrated AiM MXS Strada dash display
